translation: Homage to the Universally Radiant Buddha
meaning: One whose wisdom light illuminates all directions universally

translation: Homage to the Universally Bright Buddha
meaning: One who sheds brilliant light upon all beings without discrimination

translation: Homage to the Universally Pure Buddha
meaning: One whose body, speech, and mind are completely purified

chinese: 南無多摩羅跋栴檀香佛
pinyin: Námó Duō Mó Luó Bá Zhān Tán Xiāng Fó
translation: Homage to the Tamala-leaf Sandalwood Fragrance Buddha
meaning: One whose virtue spreads like the fragrance of sandalwood, benefiting all

translation: Homage to the Sandalwood Light Buddha
meaning: One whose radiance carries the purifying quality of sandalwood

translation: Homage to the Jewel Banner Buddha
meaning: One whose teachings stand like a jeweled banner, visible to all

chinese: 南無歡喜藏摩尼寶積佛

meaning: One who stores and freely gives the jewel of Dharma joy

chinese: 南無一切世間樂見上大精進佛

pinyin: Námó Mó Ní Chuáng Dēng Guāng Fó

translation: Homage to the Wisdom Torch Illuminating Buddha
meaning: One whose wisdom burns like a torch, revealing the true nature of reality

pinyin: Námó Hǎi Dé Guāng Míng Fó
translation: Homage to the Ocean-Virtue Bright Light Buddha
meaning: One whose virtue is vast as the ocean and radiant as light

chinese: 南無金剛牢強普散金光佛

meaning: One whose vajra-firm radiance of golden light pervades everywhere

pinyin: Námó Dà Qiáng Jīng Jìn Yǒng Měng Fó

translation: Homage to the Great Compassion Light Buddha
meaning: One whose great compassion radiates as light, embracing all beings

translation: Homage to the Loving-Kindness Power King Buddha
meaning: One whose loving-kindness is a sovereign power that conquers all

translation: Homage to the Loving-Kindness Treasury Buddha
meaning: One who stores an inexhaustible treasury of loving-kindness

pinyin: Námó Zhān Tán Kū Zhuāng Yán Shèng Fó
translation: Homage to the Sandalwood Cave Majestic Buddha

translation: Homage to the Virtuous and Good Crown Buddha
meaning: One crowned with supreme virtue and goodness

translation: Homage to the Wholesome Intention Buddha
meaning: One whose every thought is imbued with goodness and altruistic intent

pinyin: Námó Guǎng Zhuāng Yán Wáng Fó
translation: Homage to the Vast Majestic King Buddha
meaning: One whose majestic qualities extend boundlessly in all directions

translation: Homage to the Golden Flower Light Buddha
meaning: One whose radiance blooms like golden flowers

chinese: 南無寶蓋照空自在力王佛
pinyin: Námó Bǎo Gài Zhào Kōng Zì Zài Lì Wáng Fó

pinyin: Námó Xū Kōng Bǎo Huá Guāng Fó

pinyin: Námó Liú Lí Zhuāng Yán Wáng Fó

pinyin: Námó Pǔ Xiàn Sè Shēn Guāng Fó

pinyin: Námó Bù Dòng Zhì Guāng Fó

pinyin: Námó Xiáng Fú Zhòng Mó Wáng Fó
translation: Homage to the Subduer of All Demon Kings Buddha

translation: Homage to the Talent Bright Light Buddha
meaning: One whose eloquent wisdom shines brilliantly

translation: Homage to the Supreme Wisdom Buddha
meaning: One whose wisdom surpasses all — the ultimate knowing

pinyin: Námó Mí Lè Xiān Guāng Fó

translation: Homage to the World-Purifying Light Buddha
meaning: One whose light purifies entire world systems

pinyin: Námó Lóng Zhǒng Shàng Zūn Wáng Fó
translation: Homage to the Dragon Lineage Supreme King Buddha

pinyin: Námó Huì Chuáng Shèng Wáng Fó

translation: Homage to the Wondrous Sound Buddha
meaning: One whose speech carries the supreme melody of Dharma

translation: Homage to the Eternal Light Banner Buddha
meaning: One whose banner of light endures eternally, never fading

translation: Homage to the World-Observing Lamp Buddha

pinyin: Námó Huì Wēi Dēng Wáng Fó

translation: Homage to the Dharma Supreme King Buddha

translation: Homage to the Mount Sumeru Light Buddha

pinyin: Námó Xū Màn Nà Huá Guāng Fó

pinyin: Námó Dà Huì Lì Wáng Fó

pinyin: Námó Ā Chù Pí Huān Xǐ Guāng Fó

pinyin: Námó Wú Liàng Yīn Shēng Wáng Fó

translation: Homage to the Talent Light Buddha

translation: Homage to the Golden Ocean Light Buddha
meaning: One whose light is as vast and precious as a golden ocean

chinese: 南無山海慧自在通王佛

pinyin: Námó Yī Qiè Fǎ Cháng Mǎn Wáng Fó

pinyin: Námó Shì Jiā Móu Ní Fó

pinyin: Námó Jīn Gāng Bù Huài Fó
translation: Homage to the Vajra Indestructible Buddha

translation: Homage to the Jewel Radiance Buddha
meaning: One who blazes with precious jewel light

translation: Homage to the Dragon Sovereign King Buddha
meaning: One who is supreme lord of all naga kings

translation: Homage to the Vigorous Army Buddha
meaning: One who leads an army of joyous effort against all obstacles

translation: Homage to the Joyous Effort Buddha
meaning: One who delights in unceasing virtuous effort

translation: Homage to the Jewel Fire Buddha
meaning: One whose wisdom fire burns with precious jewel brilliance

translation: Homage to the Jewel Moonlight Buddha
meaning: One who shines with the cool, precious light of the moon

translation: Homage to the Manifesting Non-Ignorance Buddha
meaning: One who reveals the absence of ignorance in all phenomena

translation: Homage to the Jewel Moon Buddha
meaning: One who is like a precious moon, serene and luminous

translation: Homage to the Stainless Buddha
meaning: One completely free from all defilements and impurities

translation: Homage to the Separated from Stain Buddha
meaning: One who has permanently separated from all defilement

translation: Homage to the Courageous Giving Buddha
meaning: One who gives fearlessly and generously to all

translation: Homage to the Pure and Clean Buddha
meaning: One of complete and utter purity in all respects

translation: Homage to the Pure Giving Buddha
meaning: One whose generosity is completely pure and selfless

translation: Homage to the Saruna (Water Deity) Buddha
meaning: One connected with the purifying essence of water

translation: Homage to the Water Deva Buddha
meaning: One who dwells in the celestial realm of water

translation: Homage to the Firm Virtue Buddha
meaning: One whose virtue is steadfast and unshakeable

pinyin: Námó Zhān Tán Gōng Dé Fó

pinyin: Námó Wú Liàng Jū Guāng Fó
translation: Homage to the Immeasurable Handfuls of Light Buddha
meaning: One who offers immeasurable handfuls of radiant light

translation: Homage to the Radiant Virtue Buddha
meaning: One whose very virtue shines as luminous radiance

translation: Homage to the Sorrowless Virtue Buddha
meaning: One whose virtue completely dispels all sorrow

translation: Homage to the Narayana Buddha
meaning: One with the indomitable strength of the cosmic being Narayana

translation: Homage to the Merit Flower Buddha

translation: Homage to the Lotus Light Playful Supernatural Power Buddha

translation: Homage to the Wealth Merit Buddha

translation: Homage to the Virtuous Mindfulness Buddha
meaning: One whose mindfulness is a supreme virtue

pinyin: Námó Shàn Míng Chēng Gōng Dé Fó

pinyin: Námó Hóng Yàn Dì Chuáng Wáng Fó

translation: Homage to the Battle-Victorious Buddha
